header.betaHint: This setup wizard is in beta — features may change.

home.title: Your
home.description: Here you can add a Telegram account or change API settings for your userbot.
home.empty: No accounts yet. Tap the button below to add your first one.
home.deleteConfirmBody: Account {id} will be disconnected. Session files and bot settings will be removed from the server, and the container will restart.

credentials.title: Telegram
credentials.description: Get these from my.telegram.org — log in, open API development tools, and create an app.
credentials.whatIsThis: What are API ID and Hash?
credentials.whatIsThisBody: These are keys from a Telegram app — like a login and password for your userbot. Telegram issues them only on my.telegram.org: sign in, open «API development tools», create an app, then copy API ID and API Hash here. Your own keys are safer than shared ones.
credentials.emptyError: Enter both API ID and API Hash.
credentials.defaultsWarning: These are keys of [@SunnexGB](https://t.me/SunnexGB). By using them you accept that all responsibility lies entirely on you, not on [@SunnexGB](https://t.me/SunnexGB). We strongly recommend getting your own keys at [my.telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org) to avoid any conflicts.
credentials.defaultsConfirmBody: These are keys of [@SunnexGB](https://t.me/SunnexGB). By taking them you confirm that all responsibility lies entirely on you, not on [@SunnexGB](https://t.me/SunnexGB), to avoid any conflicts. We recommend creating your own keys at [my.telegram.org](https://my.telegram.org) instead.

login.title: Sign in to
login.description: Choose how you want to log in to your account.
login.sendCodeHint: Check Telegram and enter the code below.
login.qrHint: Open Telegram → Settings → Devices → Link Desktop Device

bot.title: Helper
bot.description: Enter the @username of your inline helper bot. It is used for inline mode in your userbot.
bot.suggestLabel: Or use a random name for this userbot:
bot.usernameTaken: This @username is already used by another account in this container.
bot.usernameFormat: Bot username must end with bot, e.g. myhelper_bot.

success.title: All set!
success.description: Your userbot is restarting with the new session.

errors.csrfInit: Could not start a secure session. Enable cookies and refresh the page.
errors.csrfInvalid: Session expired. Enable cookies in your browser and refresh the page.
errors.unknownContainer: This page was opened incorrectly. Use the link from your HikkaHost panel.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.authFailed: Login session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.credentials_empty: Enter both API ID and API Hash.
errors.provisionInProgress: Setup is already in progress. Wait and try again.
errors.requestFailed: Could not reach the server. Wait a moment and refresh the page.
errors.serverError: Server error. Wait a minute and refresh the page.
errors.networkError: No connection to the server. Check your network and refresh.
errors.credentialsApplyFailed: API keys may not have been applied or the container did not restart. Try again.
errors.provisionFailed: Could not finish setup. Check the container logs and try again.
errors.botUsernameInvalidChars: Bot username may only contain Latin letters, digits, and _.
errors.botUsernameFormat: Bot username must end with bot, e.g. myhelper_bot.
